settings.heading: Starting a Registered Training Organisation (RTO) can be exceptionally rewarding.

settings.text:
However, there are many compliance and regulatory requirements you must know before embarking on this adventure. 

At Compliance and Quality Assurance (CAQA), we can help you understand these requirements to make an informed decision.

Our expert consultants have strong Vocational Education and Training (VET) backgrounds, and their aim is that you start your RTO on a well-founded platform.

CAQA will work with you from start to end. 

We take a holistic approach to the RTO setup, where we coach you through the process. 

Our support doesn’t end there. We can support your ongoing compliance and quality assurance requirements and needs after the RTO has been registered.

These are the main steps to register your RTO with the Australian Skills Quality Authority (ASQA) (or, in some cases, a state regulator).

1. Idea and Intention

2. Planning and Research

3. Preparation and Formulation

4. Submitting the application

5. Risk Assessment

6. Registration Audit

7. RTO Registration
